message.content:
@startuml
participant "Developer" as Dev1
participant "Vercel Build Machine" as BuildMachine
participant "CMS" as CMS
participant "Vercel Production Machine" as ProductionMachine

Dev1 ..> BuildMachine : Git push

BuildMachine ..> BuildMachine : Compile

BuildMachine ..> CMS : Fetch content data

BuildMachine ..> BuildMachine : Return content data

BuildMachine ..> ProductionMachine : Generate static pages

BuildMachine ..> ProductionMachine : Upload build output

BuildMachine ..> ProductionMachine : Deploy

@enduml
